summary: Undifferentiated mesenchymal cells in dental pulp have a high potential for differentiation into several specific cell types related to teeth; hence, they are classified as multipotent. \(\boxed{\text{Multipotent}}\)
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Undifferentiated mesenchymal cells in dental pulp have a high potential for differentiation into several specific cell types related to teeth; hence, they are classified as multipotent. \(\boxed{\text{Multipotent}}\). Answer choice: A
